final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for UGREEN NAS brand 618 anniversary celebration e-commerce announcement.

Style/medium: clean commercial poster design, modern tech brand aesthetic with promotional energy
Composition: centered layout with strong visual hierarchy, headline at top, product hero in middle, offer details at bottom
Subject: UGREEN NAS private cloud storage device as hero product, sleek metallic enclosure, subtle glow indicating connectivity
Scene/backdrop: abstract gradient background suggesting cloud/data flow, subtle 618 anniversary visual cues
Lighting/mood: soft product lighting with subtle rim light, professional studio feel, celebratory but not cluttered
Color palette: UGREEN brand green as primary accent, clean white and light gray base, subtle gold or orange for promotional highlights
Text (verbatim): "绿联私有云品牌618周年庆活动电商宣布海报"
Constraints: must work as e-commerce banner; key information must be readable at thumbnail size; maintain brand consistency
Avoid: generic stock photo aesthetic; cluttered layout; unreadable small text; excessive decorative elements; 8K stuffer words
